scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir apps/web lint && uv run --directory apps/api ruff check .
scripts.format:check: prettier --config ../.prettierrc.json --ignore-path ../.prettierignore --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml ../.prettierrc.json apps/web && uv run --directory apps/api ruff format --check .
scripts.test: pnpm --dir apps/web test && uv run --directory apps/api pytest
